title: Bump c/image to v5.36.2, c/common v0.64.2, ulinkunitz/xz v0.5.12, Docker 28.3.3, Buildah to v1.41.4
body:
This bump c/image to v5.36.2, c/common to v0.64.2, ulinkunitz/xz to v0.5.12, and finally Buildah to v1.41.2.  

All of this in preparation for Podman v5.6.1

comments.body: There's a github.com/docker/docker update to 28.3.3+incompatible that we should probably pull in, even though we don't use its networking.

> There's a github.com/docker/docker update to 28.3.3+incompatible that we should probably pull in, even though we don't use its networking.

The CVE-2025-54388 fix is in docker specific code that we don't use, it has nothing to do with buildah or podman so I really don't think we need this at all
Repushed with the right version number.  Since I was in the neighborhood, I thought I'd be safe rather than sorry and dinged Docker too.
The runc failures are a bit concerning, I'm not sure what would be causing those to fall over, and the expected/actual values look to be the same?
